MAP.COMMENT: -- Get Transient Error Details from Config --

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Setting status to NOTACHIEVED and creation of future challenges ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: -- Get period details where status is INPROGRESS, period to date<current date ---

MAP.COMMENT: ---update period status to NOTACHIEVED in challengePeriodsListNotifications doc list---
-- ALTVE-132 removed ALTVE-204 --- VE-1438 Publish Change Event Notification ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if there are separate incoming periods for which future periods are to be created ---
check whether transient error or not

SEQUENCE.NAME: true
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: transient error, throw exception for retry

Values.value: Transient error occured. Failed to process periods for market - %reqHeader/x-vitality-legal-entity-id% on date - %currentDate% for PeriodId - %inputChallengePeriods/challengePeriodId%. Suspending trigger to retry processing message later.
Failed to execute subscribeToCreateFutureChallPeriods service due to transient error. Throwing exception for retry.

SEQUENCE.NAME: false
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- Do Nothing continue processing of other items in the loop ---

Values.value: Error occured in creation of Future periods for Challenge - %challengeList/challengeId% for market - %reqHeader/x-vitality-legal-entity-id% on date - %currentDate%. Error - %exception/message%.

MAP.COMMENT: --- Form a list of error challenges ---
--- drop unused at the end of loop ---
---VE-1438 Publish Change Event Notification to Async Service ---
---VE-1438 Publish Change Event Notification to Async Service ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether transient error or not
